title: Online survey of newcomers in communities participating in the Rural and Northern Immigration Pilot (RNIP) - Canada.ca
content:
## Online survey of newcomers in communities participating in the Rural and Northern Immigration Pilot (RNIP)
Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada (IRCC) is conducting an online survey of newcomers' experiences participating in the Rural and Northern Immigration Pilot (RNIP). The survey will help IRCC understand how the pilot is working, and what needs improvement.
Participation in the survey is voluntary and confidential. IRCC will only use the information from the survey to help improve the department's programs and services. Participants' answers won't affect any past, current or future applications with IRCC.
- Beginning on October 5, 2022, an invitation to take the survey will be sent by email to newcomers who immigrated to Canada through the Pilot
- The online survey takes about 10 minutes to complete
- It's available in both official languages: English and French
- The deadline to complete the survey is October 19, 2022
More information about the invitation to participate in the survey
- Participants will receive an invitation by email to take the online survey
- The survey link starts with https://ircc.qualtrics.com/jfe/form/SV
- There are no attachments
- There will be an email address to contact IRCC with any questions
We extend our thanks to those who participate in this survey to help IRCC improve its programs and services.
